description: Semiconductor and AI supply-chain layers (design through foundational models). Complements power-tier and ecosystem data in tiers.json; tickers link to listed equities where applicable.

companies.name: Synopsys
companies.moatSummary: ~90% EDA market share. License revocation halts all chip design globally.

companies.name: Cadence Design Systems
companies.moatSummary: EDA duopoly partner. Together with SNPS, controls chip design tooling.

companies.name: Arm Holdings
companies.moatSummary: Royalty tax on every chip using its blueprint — Apple, Amazon, NVIDIA custom silicon all pay.

companies.name: ASML
companies.moatSummary: Sole manufacturer of EUV machines ($350M+ each). No 2nm/3nm chip can exist without them.

companies.name: TSMC
companies.moatSummary: Only foundry for advanced AI chips. CoWoS packaging tech is the #1 current cause of GPU shortages.

companies.name: Micron
companies.moatSummary: HBM3 memory is required for every AI GPU. Supply failure halts GPU production.

companies.name: Broadcom
companies.moatSummary: Custom ASICs and Ethernet switching — the spinal cord connecting GPU clusters.

companies.name: Marvell
companies.moatSummary: InfiniBand/Ethernet switching and custom silicon for hyperscalers.

companies.name: Vertiv
companies.moatSummary: Air cooling cannot handle H100/Blackwell density. Vertiv dominates liquid-to-chip thermal management.

companies.name: Eaton
companies.moatSummary: Transformers and switchgear with 2–3 year lead times — a bigger near-term bottleneck than chips.

companies.name: Schneider Electric
companies.moatSummary: Data center power distribution and UPS systems.

companies.name: Constellation Energy
companies.moatSummary: AI needs 24/7/365 power. Nuclear is the only viable source at scale. CEG is the new AI utility.

companies.name: Vistra
companies.moatSummary: Nuclear and gas peaker plants serving hyperscale data center demand.

companies.name: Microsoft
companies.moatSummary: Only entities with $100B+ annual capex to buy all of layers 1–4. Azure owns the land AI vassals live on.

companies.name: Alphabet
companies.moatSummary: GCP + TPU custom silicon + DeepMind. Vertically integrated from L1 to L6.

companies.name: Amazon
companies.moatSummary: AWS is the largest cloud. Trainium/Inferentia custom chips reduce NVIDIA dependence.

companies.name: OpenAI
companies.moatSummary: Tethered to Microsoft Azure. Capital from MSFT is spent back on Azure compute — round-trip capital.

companies.name: Anthropic
companies.moatSummary: Tethered to AWS and Google. Dual-landlord dependency.

companies.name: Meta
companies.moatSummary: Unique: builds its own infra (L4/L5) while also being an L6 model producer. Most vertically integrated AI company after Google.
